title: Turnkey Nx Witness Integration Expert
desc:
I need a certified, locally based Systems Integrator who can design, install, and hand-over a complete Nx Witness video management environment—hardware, licensing, and configuration included—and then take it well beyond a stock deployment.

The core platform will run Nx Witness, but I also need:

• Third-party software integration – using the Nx API/SDK to link our in-house “NX Witness” applications and services seamlessly with the VMS.  
• Advanced video analytics – facial recognition, object detection & tracking, and license plate recognition must run reliably on live and recorded streams, with results exposed via the same API layer for downstream use.

Success for me looks like a single sign-on dashboard where operators can review cameras, receive analytic events in real time, and pass those events to our NX Witness applications without manual intervention. You will be responsible for everything from on-site network planning and server sizing to custom plugin development, testing, and final knowledge-transfer.

I am happy to collaborate on hardware selection, but expect you to supply part numbers, lead times, and a clear install schedule. Code should be documented, push to our private Git repo, and compile cleanly on the current Nx Witness LTS release.

If you have previously delivered Nx Witness projects that incorporated API/SDK work, please briefly describe them when you respond.

title: Collect 300 Investor Surveys
desc:
I have already built a Google Forms questionnaire for my academic research and now need 300 complete, valid submissions from people who actively invest their own money. The form link is ready; once we start, I will share it with you so you can begin distribution straight away.

Target group  
• Individual investors—any age, occupation, or industry is fine as long as they personally make investment decisions (stocks, mutual funds, crypto, real estate, etc.).  
• No requirement to restrict by profession; the only must-have is that each respondent genuinely invests.

What I need from you  
• Drive traffic to the form through your own channels, communities, mailing lists, or paid outreach—whatever works, as long as responses are authentic.  
• Monitor submissions to avoid duplicates or obviously fake entries.  
• Keep me updated every 50 responses so I can track progress.

Deliverables  
• 300 completed Google Forms records that meet the above criteria.  
• An exported CSV of the responses plus the raw Google Forms spreadsheet access.  
• Brief summary of outreach methods used for transparency.

Acceptance criteria  
• All 300 entries come from individual investors (self-reported in the form).  
• No more than 5 % duplicates or junk responses; any overage must be replaced.  
• Delivery within the agreed timeline (10 days).

If you already manage investor-focused groups—or have experience running online survey panels—let me know. Looking forward to getting this phase of my researc

title: US Peptide TikTok & Instagram Peptide Promotion
desc:
Promoting our peptide brand means putting educational, science-backed short-form videos in front of the right eyes on TikTok and Instagram. The focus is clear:

• Content style: concise educational videos that explain what peptides are, how they work, and why they matter.  
• Platforms: publish natively on both TikTok and Instagram (Reels).  
• Goal: push qualified traffic to our site; every clip should include a strong, trackable call-to-action link.

Creators must be U.S. or Canadian residents already speaking to peptide, skincare, wellness, sports performance, or power-building audiences, and their follower base must likewise skew heavily toward the U.S./CA. I’ll provide branding guidelines, product education, and a unique URL for each creator. 

Your role is to:

1. Identify and confirm suitable creators.  
2. Coordinate script angles and deliverables so the science stays accurate yet accessible.  
3. Schedule, post, and monitor the content on both platforms (or guide the creators to do so).  
4. Supply post links, analytics, and traffic numbers so we can see the lift in real time.

I’m happy to discuss the number of creators and video volumes you feel will hit our traffic targets most efficiently. Let’s get our peptide story circulating among the right U.S./CA audiences and turn that interest into clicks.
